nasb.text: that you will take up this taunt against the king of Babylon, and say, “How the oppressor has ceased, And how fury has ceased!

esv.text: you will take up this taunt against the king of Babylon: “How the oppressor has ceased, the insolent fury ceased!

cnv.text: 你必唱出這首詩歌來諷刺巴比倫王，說： “欺壓人的，怎麼止息了呢！ 強暴怎麼止住了呢！

ccb.text: 他们必这样讥笑巴比伦王： “暴君灭亡了！ 暴政结束了！

csbs.text: 你必对巴比伦王唱这首讽刺歌： “压迫人的怎么止息了呢？ 凶暴怎么止息了呢？
